# Coupon Now

> Google for Coupons — search merchants, discover verified promo codes, and visit stores.

## Purpose

Coupon Now helps shoppers find active coupon codes and merchant promotions through search.

## Primary routes

- /
- /search
- /merchant/{slug}
- /about
- /contact
- /privacy
- /terms
- /disclosure

## Data policy

Coupon and merchant content is curated for discovery. Expired offers are filtered from active listings.

## Contact

hello@couponnow.example
